message:
test(http/h2): add comprehensive PUSH_PROMISE security tests

Expand H2 connection and stream test coverage for PUSH_PROMISE
handling edge cases and security requirements (bd-1ckh).

New connection.rs tests:
- push_promise_rejected_on_closed_stream: Verify PUSH_PROMISE fails
  with StreamClosed error when targeting closed streams
- push_promise_enforces_max_concurrent_streams: Confirm pushed
  streams count against MAX_CONCURRENT_STREAMS limit
- Additional tests for PUSH_PROMISE header validation

New stream.rs tests:
- Comprehensive stream state machine tests
- Push stream lifecycle verification
- HPACK context isolation between pushed streams
- Resource limit enforcement on pushed content

These tests verify compliance with RFC 9113 Section 8.4 security
requirements for server push.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
